# Products

Operations related to products. Products consist of the categories and offerings for services and products.

## Operations At A Glance

| Method | Path | Summary | Auth |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `GET` | `/product-categories` | List product categories. | Bearer token required |
| `GET` | `/products` | List products. | Bearer token required |
| `POST` | `/taxes` | Create tax. | Bearer token required |
| `DELETE` | `/taxes/{tax_id}` | Delete tax. | Bearer token required |
| `GET` | `/territories` | List territories. | Bearer token required |

## `GET /product-categories`

List product categories.

List product categories.

- Operation ID: `get-product-categories`
- Authentication: Bearer token required
- Related schemas: `ApiError404`, `ApiError500`, `ApiFail422`, `ProductCategoryCollection`

### Parameters

| Name | In | Required | Schema | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `sort` | `query` | No | string | Comma separated list of fields used for sorting. Placing a minus symbol in front of a field name sorts in descending order. Defaults to `title`. |
| `per_page` | `query` | No | string | The number of items per page. Defaults to 25. |
| `page` | `query` | No | string | The requested page. Defaults to 1. |
| `filter[search]` | `query` | No | string | Return product categories that have fields matching this term. |

### Request Body

None.

### Responses

| Status | Description | Content |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `200` | ProductCategoryCollection | `application/json`: `ProductCategoryCollection` |
| `404` | ApiError404 | `application/json`: `ApiError404` |
| `422` | ApiFail422 | `application/json`: `ApiFail422` |
| `500` | ApiError500 | `application/json`: `ApiError500` |

## `GET /products`

List products.

List products.

- Operation ID: `get-products`
- Authentication: Bearer token required
- Related schemas: `ApiError404`, `ApiError500`, `ApiFail422`, `ProductCollection`

### Parameters

| Name | In | Required | Schema | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `sort` | `query` | No | string | Comma separated list of fields used for sorting. Placing a minus symbol in front of a field name sorts in descending order. Defaults to `title`. |
| `per_page` | `query` | No | string | The number of items per page. Defaults to 25. |
| `page` | `query` | No | string | The requested page. Defaults to 1. |
| `filter[search]` | `query` | No | string | Return products that have fields matching this term. |
| `filter[include_inactive]` | `query` | No | boolean | Include inactive products (in addition to active products) when returning products. |
| `filter[category_ids][]` | `query` | No | array of string (uuid) | Return products in the given categories. |
| `filter[type]` | `query` | No | string | Return products matching the given type. Allowed values are: MAIN, ADDON. |

### Request Body

None.

### Responses

| Status | Description | Content |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `200` | ProductCollection | `application/json`: `ProductCollection` |
| `404` | ApiError404 | `application/json`: `ApiError404` |
| `422` | ApiFail422 | `application/json`: `ApiFail422` |
| `500` | ApiError500 | `application/json`: `ApiError500` |

## `GET /territories`

List territories.

List territories.

- Operation ID: `get-territories`
- Authentication: Bearer token required
- Related schemas: `ApiError403`, `ApiError404`, `ApiError500`, `ApiFail422`, `TerritoryCollection`

### Parameters

| Name | In | Required | Schema | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `filter[address_id]` | `query` | No | string (uuid) | An address ID. When set, only territories that contain this address within their bounds are returned. |

### Request Body

None.

### Responses

| Status | Description | Content |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `200` | OK | `application/json`: `TerritoryCollection` |
